must_detect.matched_text: Project Haneul Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Acquisition in the Republic of Korea

Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 private placement of convertible bonds and a call option to acquire 70% of Pinebit Keeper Co., a digital-asset custody business (DPT-related), with closing targeted for 90 days post-signing.

Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 private placement of convertible bonds and a call option to acquire 70% of Pinebit Keeper Co., a digital-asset custody business (DPT-related), with closing targeted for 90 days post-signing.

Use of proceeds: fund the acquisition and implement climate-risk mitigation upgrades to Seonam Tech’s data centers (Scope 2 renewable PPA pilot and grid-interactive cooling), items currently not publicly disclosed.

Regulatory: closing subject to applicable provisions of the Capital Markets Act of Korea, notification to the Digital Asset Reporting Bureau, and any directive of the Korean Financial Compliance Authority; any material change in relevant regulations allows good-faith renegotiation.

Disclosure and conduct: no selective disclosure or tipping; all public statements coordinated through the issuer’s designated disclosure officer and released via the national disclosure system at signing or closing as appropriate.

Exclusivity and break fee: 60-day exclusivity from LOI; no-shop and standstill apply to competing crypto-custody or ESG-linked financing proposals, with a KRW 1,200,000,000 break fee upon willful breach.

Exclusivity and break fee: 60-day exclusivity from LOI; no-shop and standstill apply to competing crypto-custody or ESG-linked financing proposals, with a KRW 1,200,000,000 break fee upon willful breach.
